notes: SurveyCTO does not publish a machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger spec, so this document was hand-authored from vendor docs plus the OpenFn adaptor source (Adaptor.js/Utils.js). Coverage is scoped to the endpoints the adaptor actually calls. fetchSubmissions -> GET /forms/data/wide/json/{formId} and GET /forms/data/csv/{formId} (query: date, r=review status). list -> GET /datasets and GET /datasets/{datasetId}/records (paginated with limit/cursor; adaptor expects {data,nextCursor,total}). upsertDataset -> GET/POST/PUT /datasets(/{id}). upsertRecord -> PATCH /datasets/{datasetId}/record?recordId=. uploadCsvRecords -> POST /datasets/{datasetId}/records/upload (multipart file + metadata). Auth is HTTP Basic. Real base URL is https://{servername}.surveycto.com/api/{apiVersion}; Datasets endpoints use v2. Submission and DatasetRecord shapes are open (additionalProperties) because fields are form/dataset-specific; only stable metadata fields are enumerated. Caveats: exact response envelope for pagination and the upload-result body were inferred from adaptor behavior, not from a published schema.
